directive.title: FS-SCHEMA-003: access_denied_audit Table DDL and Migration

auditor.summary: The build successfully implements the access_denied_audit table schema and migration as specified. All eight acceptance criteria are satisfied. The schema.ts file correctly defines the table with Drizzle ORM, including the composite index and type exports. The migration SQL creates the table with proper column types, index, and append-only permissions. The only minor issue is the hardcoded database role name in the migration, which is a LOW severity concern. The build is ready for deployment.

top_issues.description: The migration uses a hardcoded role name 'flowseer_app' instead of a parameterized placeholder. While the directive mentions replacing <app_role> with the platform's role, using a hardcoded value could cause issues if the actual role differs across environments.
